nodes.title: 1. Load te image in the I2V input as usual, then run the job
3. Run as many jobs as you want at this point, loras, prompts, length...
This method saves the frames as png, be sure to delete
the images in /Outputs/{number} folder once you're done
4. When you're done, Read step 5 below
0. Enable the toggle avobe and set the path to your output folder down below
unless you want to mix scenes
2. Once the job is complete, enable K3nk node toggle and queue more jobs
T2V Lightning LoRAs
widgets_values:
- Download the following **T2V LoRA** from Hugging Face
- Place the LoRA inside your ComfyUI `models/loras` directory.

  - [Wan2.2-T2V-A14B-4steps-lora-250928](https://huggingface.co/lightx2v/Wan2.2-Lightning/tree/main/Wan2.2-T2V-A14B-4steps-lora-250928)

nodes.title: This node overrides I2V size to match image
motion_latent_count is the amount of 4frames batches it sees
you can alter the order of frames with the settings inside the K3NK image grab nodes
WanVideo SVIPro Embeds will pick up only the last 4 frames, since wrapper works in batches of 4frames
SVI LoRAs
widgets_values:
- Download the following **SVI I2V LoRAs** from Hugging Face

- Place both LoRAs inside your ComfyUI `models/loras` directory.
  - [https://huggingface.co/vita-video-gen/svi-model/tree/main/version-2.0](https://huggingface.co/vita-video-gen/svi-model/tree/main/version-2.0)

nodes.title: then run a job for comining the PNG frames
5. Enable the toggle at the bottom of this section, called "final step"
Make sure this block is muted for first and last run
Batch png combine for video extend
Toggle it On, run the job to combine PNG into a video and toggle it OFF
Tips:
widgets_values:
TIPS:

- Hide noodles by pressing the dedicated ComfyUI button in the bottom right "👁️"

- Go to SETTINGS, search for: "Display animated previews when sampling"
  Turn it ON to watch the video build directly in the sampler node.

- Yo can try different combinations of lightx2v loras and lightning1.1 loras.
